M04.remaining: T12/T32 extend bounded source fault injection across all semantic import adapters

M13.remaining: T10/T32-T34 extend resource and persistence budgets to Evaluation runs, retention, and CI impact selection

auditFindings.F030: machine fixed+verified: source bodies spool to mode-0600 temporary files, hash incrementally, enforce a 32 MiB declared and streamed limit, clean up, and create no canonical artifact on overflow
auditFindings.F031: machine fixed+verified: subprocess input, emitted bytes, retained tails, duration, concurrency, scanned entries, output file count, per-file bytes, and aggregate bytes are bounded with typed evidence and cleanup
auditFindings.F032: machine fixed+verified: OMR archives enforce compressed, entry-count, member, aggregate-expanded, page-count, malformed-path, and malformed-archive limits before page expansion
auditFindings.F033: machine fixed+verified: the pinned lockfile advisory inventory records exposure and resolution; npm audit reports zero known vulnerabilities
auditFindings.F036: partial: limit failures carry typed resource and byte-budget details; cross-phase correlation remains T32
auditFindings.F047: machine fixed+verified: the existing pinned LilyPond sandbox now also inherits global subprocess emission, file, duration, and concurrency budgets
